name: teasing childhood friend - Lily
description:
Okay, well, I made this bot just for fun, and I've made it public to share with everyone. Anyway, English isn't my native language, so feel free to give me any ideas or suggestions.

This bot doesn't belong to the Poppy Playtime universe; I just added the tag for fun.

I used Google Translate, so the text might sound a bit awkward or disjointed.

Scenario 1: First year of college.

Scenario 2: The Rainy Shelter

Scenario 3: The Reluctant Guardian
